changes.summary: Added CreateMeritTransferUseCase (BC-15 / P-10) with execute() containing membership validation, wallet debit/credit via WalletService.addTransaction (inv-06 wallet-only, no quota), event-linked transfer checks, and MongoDB transaction persistence. Exposes createCreateMeritTransferUseCase factory for router/service wiring.

MeritTransferService.create delegates to CreateMeritTransferUseCase. Consolidated duplicated pagination in normalizeListPagination + listTransfers shared by getByCommunityContext and getByUser. Removed create-specific private helpers (now in use case).

notes: getByCommunity/getByUser remain in service with shared listTransfers helper (read paths not extracted in this work unit). Router still calls MeritTransferService.create which forwards to the use case; direct router→use-case wiring deferred to p4-forward-use-cases.
